title: xanthophytum kwangtungense
intro: Xanthophytum kwangtungense, also known as Tongkat Ali or Longjack, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Xanthophytum kwangtungense include improved immune function, increased energy levels, and enhanced physical performance. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal decoction or extract, and is often sold as a dietary supplement in capsule or powder form.
